_instructions: Update due_date fields when you receive a renewal notice. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Leave as YYYY-MM-DD if the date is not yet known — the tracker will skip unknown dates safely.

obligations.name: Section 8 Annual Recertification
obligations.what_to_bring: Income verification, lease agreement, government-issued ID, any changes in household composition
obligations.notes: Contact housing authority at least 60 days before due date. Missing this deadline can result in loss of housing assistance.

obligations.name: SNAP / Food Stamps Recertification
obligations.contact: ASES / Departamento de la Familia Puerto Rico
obligations.what_to_bring: Income verification, ID, proof of address, household information
obligations.notes: Recertification periods vary. Check your SNAP notice or call your caseworker for exact date. Missing this means a gap in food assistance.

obligations.name: Medicare Open Enrollment / Annual Review
obligations.what_to_bring: Medicare card, list of current medications, current plan information
obligations.notes: Open Enrollment runs Oct 15 – Dec 7 every year. Review your plan each October — drug formularies and premiums change annually. Changes take effect January 1.

obligations.name: Vehicle Registration Renewal (Marbete)
obligations.what_to_bring: Inspection certificate (marbete de inspección), insurance proof, ID, payment
obligations.notes: Marbete #011907216. Vigencia abr 2026 - ene 2027. Confirmed CESCO Digital 2026-05-23.

obligations.name: Vehicle Insurance Renewal
obligations.notes: Seguro Obligatorio Form #24642001. Stamped APR 17 2026. Renews with marbete cycle.

obligations.name: Driver License Renewal (V451-100-75-336-0)
obligations.what_to_bring: Current license, proof of residence x2, Social Security card
obligations.notes: Renew license AND apply for PR ID card in same CESCO visit. VitalChek birth certificate arriving June 18-25 is needed for PR ID card.
obligations.status: OPEN — awaiting VitalChek birth certificate (arriving June 18-25)

obligations.name: VitalChek Birth Certificate Arrival

obligations.notes: Ordered 2026-05-21. Expected arrival June 18-25. When it arrives, go to CESCO immediately. Hermes reminder set for June 18.
obligations.urgency: HIGH — blocks PR ID card application

obligations.name: Puerto Rico Tax Return 2025 (Planilla)
obligations.what_to_bring: W-2s or 1099s if any, prior year return, Social Security number
obligations.notes: Original deadline passed. Zero income year — still required to file. Also verify 2024 return was filed. Call Hacienda or check online at hacienda.pr.gov to confirm status of both years.
obligations.status: OPEN — overdue, also verify 2024 return was filed

obligations.name: GoDaddy Domain Renewal — faaaith.org
obligations.notes: Auto-renews May 10, 2027. Verify payment method is current before renewal date.
